checks.title: Verify existence of implementation evidence
checks.description: Locate and confirm that documentary evidence of 'FEMA Compliance Control' implementation exists in the evidence repository.
checks.command_parameters: Access the Treasury Management System or Core Banking FX module. Review transaction registers for the applicable period.
checks.expected_result: Evidence documents are present, dated within the verification period, and signed by the responsible owner.
checks.reasoning: Document existence is verifiable by an independent reviewer without requiring departmental cooperation.

checks.title: Assess Adequacy of Evidence Against Control Objective
checks.description: Review evidence content to confirm it adequately demonstrates compliance with the control objective for 'FEMA Compliance Control'.
checks.command_parameters: Apply compliance review checklist. Document findings.
checks.expected_result: All FX transactions have: valid authorisation, A2/LRS declarations where applicable, correspondent bank confirmation, RBI reporting (Form A-2, FCGPR, etc.) filed within prescribed timelines.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.title: Auditor Sign-Off on Verification Outcome
checks.description: The reviewing auditor or compliance officer formally records the outcome of verification.
checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify existence of implementation evidence
checks.description: Locate and confirm that documentary evidence of 'Regulatory Compliance Obligation' implementation exists in the evidence repository.
checks.command_parameters: Internal Audit or Compliance Officer to conduct a structured walkthrough of the 'Regulatory Compliance Obligation' control implementation. Inspect documentation, interview relevant staff, and observe process execution. Do NOT rely solely on the implementing department's assertions.
checks.expected_result: Evidence documents are present, dated within the verification period, and signed by the responsible owner.
checks.reasoning: Document existence is verifiable by an independent reviewer without requiring departmental cooperation.

checks.title: Assess Adequacy of Evidence Against Control Objective
checks.description: Review evidence content to confirm it adequately demonstrates compliance with the control objective for 'Regulatory Compliance Obligation'.
checks.command_parameters: Apply compliance review checklist. Document findings.
checks.expected_result: Evidence of implementation consistent with the control objective. Documentary proof of obligation fulfilment. No contradictory evidence found during walkthrough.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.title: Auditor Sign-Off on Verification Outcome
checks.description: The reviewing auditor or compliance officer formally records the outcome of verification.
checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify existence of implementation evidence
checks.description: Locate and confirm that documentary evidence of 'Regulatory Compliance Obligation' implementation exists in the evidence repository.
checks.command_parameters: Internal Audit or Compliance Officer to conduct a structured walkthrough of the 'Regulatory Compliance Obligation' control implementation. Inspect documentation, interview relevant staff, and observe process execution. Do NOT rely solely on the implementing department's assertions.
checks.expected_result: Evidence documents are present, dated within the verification period, and signed by the responsible owner.
checks.reasoning: Document existence is verifiable by an independent reviewer without requiring departmental cooperation.

checks.title: Assess Adequacy of Evidence Against Control Objective
checks.description: Review evidence content to confirm it adequately demonstrates compliance with the control objective for 'Regulatory Compliance Obligation'.
checks.command_parameters: Apply compliance review checklist. Document findings.
checks.expected_result: Evidence of implementation consistent with the control objective. Documentary proof of obligation fulfilment. No contradictory evidence found during walkthrough.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.expected_result: No unauthorised payment transactions. Success/failure ratios within threshold. All declined transactions appropriately logged and investigated.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.title: Auditor Sign-Off on Verification Outcome
checks.description: The reviewing auditor or compliance officer formally records the outcome of verification.
checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify existence of implementation evidence

checks.reasoning: Document existence is verifiable by an independent reviewer without requiring departmental cooperation.
